title: Formatting Company Names
scenario: Write a prompt to format company names in a specific database table according to the following rules: all names should be in title case, and any acronyms should be capitalized.
constraints: Must only use standard SQL functions and syntax

evaluationCriteria.description: The SQL query is syntactically correct and follows standard SQL syntax.
The SQL query accurately formats all company names in the database table according to the specified rules.
The SQL query is efficient and should not cause significant performance issues with large datasets.
